postsNeedingUpdates.title: Is Co-Fermentation Cheating? Wrong Question.
reasons: Uses a 35-supplier processing coverage snapshot while current docs say 41 live sources
Says processing is a single text field, but ADR-004 and recent scraper/app changes added structured process fields
Frontmatter date 2026-04-02 conflicts with apparent PR #208 publication on 2026-04-23
postsNeedingUpdates.suggestedFix: Update with current structured processing schema or add a postscript that frames the post as the pre-schema snapshot that motivated the implementation.

newIdeas.title: Processing transparency is a schema problem, not a vocabulary problem
newIdeas.source: coffee-app ADR-004 and PR #289; coffee-scraper PRs #208/#216
newIdeas.whyNow: The co-fermentation post exposed the gap, then the code shipped structured fields for base method, fermentation type, additives, duration, disclosure level, confidence, and evidence.

newIdeas.title: Producer identity is market infrastructure, not listing copy
newIdeas.source: coffee-scraper producer column and residue-filtering work in PRs #209/#215
newIdeas.whyNow: Recent fixes show that farm, producer, region, and marketing labels need provenance-aware entity extraction before supplier comparison can become trustworthy.

newIdeas.title: The listing schema is the market
newIdeas.whyNow: The outline now has current code evidence from the 41-source footprint, /v1/catalog, and structured catalog filtering.
